top_signals.title: Chanel’s Mega Dividend Brings Owners’ Windfall to $21B
top_signals.summary: The billionaire family behind Chanel is on track to pocket at least $21 billion from payouts over the past decade, a huge windfall as their brand prospers during a downturn hitting some luxury-good rivals. Angelina Rascouet joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SEC approves Nasdaq to list Bitcoin index options on the exchange
top_signals.summary: The cash-settled, European-style contracts will trade under the ticker QBTC on Phlx, but still require CFTC approval before trading can begin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
